command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.201 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Install uptime-kuma-api ==="
pip install uptime-kuma-api --break-system-packages -q 2>&1 | tail -3 || pip3 install uptime-kuma-api --break-system-packages -q 2>&1 | tail -3
python3 -c "import uptime_kuma_api; print('lib version:', uptime_kuma_api.__version__)" 2>&1 | tail -2
REMOTE
